name: node-archy
title: node-archy
summary: Pretty-print nested hierarchies module for Node.js
description:
Pretty-print nested hierarchies module for Node.js
Given a tree of nested objects with 'label' and 'nodes' fields,
node-archy returns a string representation of that tree with unicode
pipe characters.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-archy because Pretty-print nested hierarchies module for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-archy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-archy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-archy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
